index.title: Python Tutorial for Beginners: Complete Guide
index.description: Learn Python from scratch with our free, detailed chapter-by-chapter guide. Each topic includes clear explanations, code examples, and 50+ practice questions. Designed for students aged 10-16.
index.keywords: python tutorial, learn python, python for beginners, python notes for students, python tutorial for kids, python programming guide, python chapters, python practice questions
index.intro:
Python is one of the most popular and beginner-friendly programming languages in the world. Whether you are 10 years old or 16, this guide will take you from knowing nothing about programming to writing real Python code with confidence.

Each chapter below covers one topic in detail. You will learn what the concept is, why it matters, and how to use it — with plenty of code examples. Every chapter also has a dedicated practice page with 50+ questions ranging from easy to hard, so you can test your understanding thoroughly.

This is not a quick overview. This is a complete, chapter-by-chapter Python course designed to build your skills step by step.

chapters.title: Introduction to Python
chapters.description: Learn what Python is, where it is used, and why it is the best language to start your coding journey.

chapters.title: Installing Python and Setting Up Your Environment
chapters.description: Download Python, set up an IDE, and get your computer ready to write code.

chapters.title: Your First Python Program
chapters.description: Write your first Python program using the print() function and understand how Python executes code.

chapters.title: Variables and Data Types in Python
chapters.description: Understand how to store data in variables and learn the four basic data types: int, float, str, and bool.

chapters.title: Operators in Python
chapters.description: Learn arithmetic, comparison, logical, and assignment operators with practical examples.

chapters.title: Taking Input and Type Conversion
chapters.description: Take user input with input(), and convert between data types using int(), float(), and str().

chapters.title: Conditional Statements in Python (if, elif, else)
chapters.description: Make decisions in your code using if, elif, and else statements with comparison operators.

chapters.title: Loops in Python (for and while)
chapters.description: Repeat actions using for loops and while loops, and learn when to use each one.

chapters.title: Loop Control - break, continue, pass
chapters.description: Control loop execution using break, continue, and pass statements with nested loop examples.

chapters.title: Pattern Printing in Python
chapters.description: Build star patterns, number patterns, and alphabet patterns using nested loops.

chapters.title: Strings in Python
chapters.description: Master string creation, slicing, formatting, and all important string methods.

chapters.title: Lists in Python
chapters.description: Work with Python lists — create, modify, slice, and use list methods and comprehensions.

chapters.title: Tuples in Python
chapters.description: Understand immutable sequences, tuple packing/unpacking, and when to use tuples over lists.

chapters.title: Dictionaries in Python
chapters.description: Store and retrieve data using key-value pairs with dictionary methods and iteration.

chapters.title: Sets in Python
chapters.description: Learn set operations like union, intersection, and difference for working with unique collections.

chapters.title: Functions in Python
chapters.description: Define reusable code with def, parameters, return values, default arguments, and *args/**kwargs.

chapters.title: Scope, LEGB Rule, and Closures
chapters.description: Understand variable scope (local, enclosing, global, built-in) and how closures work.

chapters.title: Lambda, Map, Filter, and Reduce
chapters.description: Write concise code with anonymous functions and functional programming tools.

chapters.title: File Handling in Python
chapters.description: Read from and write to files using open(), with statement, and file modes.

chapters.title: Exception Handling in Python
chapters.description: Handle errors gracefully with try, except, else, finally, and custom exceptions.

chapters.title: Object-Oriented Programming in Python
chapters.description: Learn classes, objects, __init__, self, methods, and encapsulation from scratch.

chapters.title: Inheritance and Polymorphism
chapters.description: Extend classes with inheritance, override methods, and understand polymorphism.

chapters.title: Modules and Packages in Python
chapters.description: Organize code with modules, import statements, and understand Python packages.

chapters.title: Comprehensions and Generators
chapters.description: Write elegant code with list/dict/set comprehensions and lazy evaluation with generators.

chapters.title: Decorators and Iterators
chapters.description: Understand the iterator protocol, create custom iterators, and use decorators to modify functions.

courseCta.text: Want to learn Python with a live mentor?
